name: Lead Close — Proposal → HITL Gate → Treasury
description: Read nurturing leads with high score, generate closing proposal, queue for HITL approval, email proposal, mark closing in CRM, feed revenue to treasury.

then.prompt: You are a senior sales closer for Bridge AI. For each lead below, write a closing proposal: a value proposition tailored to their company + intent, a clear call-to-action, and a suggested deal size in USD. Return a JSON array: [{name, email, company, score, proposal, cta, deal_usd, status: 'closing'}]. Leads: {{records}}
then.system: Return ONLY a valid JSON array. No markdown. Just the array.
then.label: Generate closing proposals

then.name: email_sender

input.subject: HITL Gate — Closing proposals ready for review
input.body: Closing proposals have been generated and written to CRM. Please review leads_closing collection and approve before dispatch.

then.label: HITL gate: email sales team for approval

then.message: HITL closing gate triggered. Sales proposals ready in leads_closing CRM. Human review required before sending.
then.label: Slack: HITL gate alert

else.message: Close workflow ran — no leads met closing threshold (score ≥ 7 in nurturing). Continue nurturing.
else.label: Slack: no closeable leads
